name: cac-press-release-subset
description: CAC ontology and SHACL files used for press-release and investigator KG validation via the SDK MCP server. Includes detection module terms used by Operation Phantom Gate. Avoids full-manifest SPARQL constraints that may fail on some pySHACL builds until upstream CAC shapes are repaired.
full_manifest_note: Use `make validate-extension EXT=cac DATA=...` for full manifest validation after upstream CAC SHACL SPARQL repairs.
